image.title: NAL Smart, N Fawkes, P Goggin, G Pennick, KD Rainsford, B Charlesworth, N Shah

item.title: A narrative review of the potential pharmacological influence and safety of ibuprofen on coronavirus disease 19 (COVID-19), ACE2, and the immune system: a dichotomy of expectation and reality.
